name: How is fault determined in AI referral lawsuits in Phoenix?
description: Expert testimony on standards proves fault in AZ.

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined in AI referral lawsuits in Phoenix?

acceptedAnswer.text: Expert testimony on standards proves fault in AZ.
acceptedAnswer.description: Via expert testimony on reasonable attorney standards, ignoring AI if improperly used. Arizona uses 'but for' test. Key factors: (1) Industry AI guidelines; (2) Disclosure absence; (3) Outcome deviation. Depositions key. Judge/jury decides based on evidence.
